C

Cashier - Class in model
Represents the cashier staff responsible for processing sales.

Layer 1: Presentation Layer (GUI).
CashierDashboard(String) - Constructor for class view.CashierDashboard
 
checkLowStock() - Method in class model.Inventory
Scans the inventory and prints an alert for products whose stock level is below the minimum threshold (5 units).
Chef - Class in model
Represents the Chef/Baker who manages the production of sweets.

O

Order - Class in model
Represents a customer's order entity.
Order(int, String, double) - Constructor for class model.Order
Constructor to initialize a new customer order.
OrderItem - Class in model
Represents an individual item within a customer's order.
OrderItem(int, String, int, double) - Constructor for class model.OrderItem
 

P

performDuty() - Method in class model.Cashier
Executes the cashier's duty, which involves processing and managing customer payments.
performDuty() - Method in class model.Chef
Executes the specific duty of the chef, which is preparing orders.
performDuty() - Method in class model.Customer
Defines the primary activity of a customer, which is browsing the shop's digital menu for sweets.
performDuty() - Method in class model.Manager
Implementation of the duty for a Manager, focusing on reviewing reports and stock management.
performDuty() - Method in class model.User
Abstract method to be implemented by subclasses to perform specific duties.
Product - Class in model
Represents a sweet product entity in the shop.
Product(int, String, double, int, String) - Constructor for class model.Product
